Description: Allows the user to view Billing Admin Dashboard
Allows the user to log their shift start and end times for billing activities.
Enables switching between different physical or logical payment locations.
Grants authority to finalize and record patient payments.
Allows the cancellation or removal of an incorrect payment entry.
Enables generating and printing of formal billing invoices for patients.
Allows the printing of proof-of-payment receipts after a transaction.
Allows the printing of bill statement
Allows viewing of credit balances or deposits held by a patient.
Grants the ability to add new funds to a patient’s deposit account.
Allows the user to use existing deposit funds to pay for services.
Grants access to view the full log of all past payments and transactions.
Allows the user to view a list of available payment points in the system.
Enables the setup and creation of new payment collection locations.
Allows modification of details for existing payment points.
Grants the authority to remove a payment point from the system.
Allows viewing of accepted payment methods (e.g., Cash, Insurance, Mobile).
Enables adding new methods of payment to the system.
Allows editing of existing payment methods and their configurations.
Grants the ability to remove a payment method from the system.
Provides access to the central dashboard for managing patient bills.
Waive Bill
Edit Bill Item
Cancel Bill Item
Refund Bill Item
Delete Bill
Allows the user to view the catalog of billable items and services.
Enables adding new billable services or items to the system catalog.
Allows updating of prices or details for billable services.
Grants the authority to remove services from the billable items list.
Allows viewing of rules and logic for patient billing exemptions.
Enables the creation of new exemption rules for specific patient groups.
